name: get-invoices
description: Fetch invoices from signed-in billing portals and file verified PDFs in Paperless-ngx or local storage.

interface.shortDescription: Collect and file invoices from billing portals
interface.longDescription: Reuse signed-in browser sessions to collect invoice PDFs, prevent duplicate processing, and dispatch verified documents to Paperless-ngx or local storage.
defaultPrompt: Fetch my latest invoices and file them safely.
Learn this billing portal and save its invoices.
List the invoice providers this plugin knows.
